@@ -501,0 +501,3 @@
+  // In top_off_collection_set(), we shrunk planned future reserve by _add_regions_to_old * region_size_bytes, but we
+  // didn't shrink available. The current reserve is not affected by the planned future reserve. Current available is
+  // larger than planned available by the planned adjustment amount.
@@ -502,0 +505,1 @@
+

@@ -79,1 +79,1 @@
-  // Adjust evacuation budgets after choosing collection set.  The argument regions_to_xfer
+  // Adjust evacuation budgets after choosing collection set.  On entry, the instance variable _regions_to_xfer

@@ -372,1 +372,0 @@
-
@@ -395,1 +394,4 @@
-
+      assert(young_generation->get_evacuation_reserve() >=
+             collection_set->get_live_bytes_in_untenurable_regions() * ShenandoahEvacWaste,
+             "adjusted evac reserve (%zu) must be large enough for planned evacuation (%zu)",
+             young_generation->get_evacuation_reserve(), collection_set->get_live_bytes_in_untenurable_regions());
